texto: Like everyone, there are times when I just don't feel like exercising. When that happens, I'm a bit more careful with my diet. But on days I really want a treat, like chocolate, I work out a little harder. I don't believe in beating myself up for not being 'good.'
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Judy Reyes: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Like everyone, there are times when I just don't feel like exercising. When that happens, I'm a b…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que trabalho, work, good pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e good.

frase_original: Like everyone, there are times when I just don't feel like exercising. When that happens, I'm a bit more careful with my diet. But on days I really want a treat, like chocolate, I work out a little harder. I don't believe in beating myself up for not being 'good.'
